zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon於1060年出生在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可時，她的父親Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn41歲，母親Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales36歲。她於1075年與Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth在英國威爾斯波斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1137年4月在威爾士享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon于1060年出生在威尔士布洛可爾布洛可时，她的父亲Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn41岁，母亲Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales36岁。她于1075年与Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth在英国威尔斯波斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1137年4月在威尔士享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Gwladys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old form of   Gladys  , of uncertain derivation.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon was born in 1060, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, her father, Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn, was 41 and her mother, Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales, was 36. She married Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth in 1075, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in April 1137, in Wales, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon est née en 1060, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth en 1075, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en avril 1137, à Galles, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon 1060 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn 41 und ihre Mutter Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales 36. Sie hat 1075 in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb im April 1137 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon è nata il nel 1060 nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, sua padre, Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth nel 1075, nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1137, nel Galles, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwladys ferch Rhiwallonが1060年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクで生まれた時，父Rhiwallon ap Cynfynは41歳，母Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Walesは36歳であった。1075年にイギリスウェールズポウイスでRhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1137年4月にウェールズで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon(이)가 1060년 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1075년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1137년 4월 웨일스에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon nasceu em 1060, em Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth em 1075, em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em abril de 1137, em Gales, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon родилась в 1060 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth в 1075 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла апрель 1137 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon nació en 1060, en Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth en 1075, en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en abril de 1137, en Gales, a la edad de 77 años.
